overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a dense foggy garden toward a Victorian hotel. The character ascends stone stairs, passes a fountain, and approaches the Lake View Hotel entrance in a haunting, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy garden path with flower beds and lamp posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel path through the foggy garden, flanked by flower bushes

entered.detail: tall black Victorian-style lamp post with white glass enclosure
dense bushes with white hydrangea flowers lining the path
grey gravel walkway winding through the garden
tall conical evergreen trees visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel path through a densely foggy garden. Victorian lamp posts and white flowering bushes line the walkway, while trimmed evergreen trees loom in the misty distance.

events.description: transition from flat garden path to ascending stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs beneath the large vine-covered archway

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward through the garden
large circular archway covered in dense green ivy and white flowers
black metal handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a wide stone staircase framed by a large vine-covered archway. Metal railings line the stairs as the character climbs toward the upper garden level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper garden with topiary and central fountain

events.description: character slows and turns to look at the fountain statue briefly

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper garden and approaching the stone fountain, pausing briefly to observe the statue

entered.detail: neatly trimmed conical evergreen trees arranged symmetrically
large bushes with abundant white and pale purple flowers
circular stone fountain basin with ornate carvings
bronze statue of a heron standing in the fountain center

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the upper garden level on gravel paths, passing between symmetrical topiary trees and hydrangea bushes. A large stone fountain with a heron statue stands in the center of the garden, which the character approaches and observes before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance patio with pergola walkway

events.description: exiting garden onto brick patio, hotel building emerges from fog

agents.ego_description: approaching the Lake View Hotel entrance, walking under the wooden pergola along the brick patio

entered.detail: large white Victorian-style wooden hotel with multiple stories and green awnings
red brick patio flooring with scattered flower petals
white wooden lattice overhead structure covered in vines
white wicker chairs and tables arranged on the patio
green fabric awning over the hotel entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the garden onto a brick patio where the Lake View Hotel building becomes visible through the fog. The character walks under a wooden pergola past white patio furniture, approaching the hotel entrance with its green awnings and illuminated doorways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, misty garden that gradually opens up to reveal the imposing facade of a Victorian hotel. It begins along a gravel path lined with lamp posts and white flowering bushes, moving through a thick fog where trimmed evergreens loom in the distance. As the path leads forward, the camera ascends a wide stone staircase framed by a vine-covered archway to reach an elevated garden level. The scene then shifts through a symmetrical arrangement of topiary trees and hydrangea bushes, passing a central stone fountain with a heron statue before emerging onto a brick patio. Finally, the camera glides under a wooden pergola and past white patio furniture, approaching the illuminated doorways and green awnings of the Lake View Hotel.
